summary: System.Threading.Channels.Channel<T> là lock-free producer-consumer queue hỗ trợ backpressure. Tốt hơn ConcurrentQueue + SemaphoreSlim cho async workload.
problem: ConcurrentQueue không có backpressure (producer outrun consumer). BlockingCollection block thread. Cần async producer-consumer với bounded capacity.
solution: Channel.CreateBounded<T>(capacity). Producer dùng WriteAsync, consumer dùng ReadAllAsync() (IAsyncEnumerable). CreateUnbounded khi không giới hạn.
tradeoffs: FullMode=DropOldest/DropNewest mất data - chỉ dùng cho telemetry/metrics
Channel không persist: app crash mất queue - cần message broker nếu durability quan trọng
producer crash mà không gọi Complete() thì consumer bị treo
